propositions: The code-review sidecar persists only surfaced findings (blocking, advisory, coaching) and omits the dropped and indeterminate buckets produced by Pass-3.
The sidecar does not persist the resolved block_threshold/blocking_enabled each finding was judged against, so the complete Pass-1 finding list is not recoverable.

Extend the sidecar to code_review_result_v2 pooling all four buckets (blocking, advisory, dropped, indeterminate), each finding retaining verification, Pass-3 decision, block_threshold, and blocking_enabled.
code_review_decide computes dropped/indeterminate but code_review_coach forwards only {verdict, blocking, advisory, coaching, coverage}, so those buckets must be wired through the verdict step.
The reader must accept both code_review_result_v1 and v2 so old records stay readable and the surfaced reader returns the blocking + advisory union unchanged.
Code review has no overflow bucket, and code-review findings carry no evidence/scenarios fields, so those are not persisted.
